title: Diconsa
overview: Diconsa is a Mexican government-owned company that operates a network of rural stores. The government wants to explore using the Diconsa network to expand financial services access to underserved rural communities.
prompt: Diconsa is a Mexican government-owned company that sells basic necessities through a network of 22,000 rural stores. The Mexican government is considering whether Diconsa can be used as a platform to provide basic financial services (e.g., bill payment, cash transfers) to rural communities.
